member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.CachedFscmReleasedDistinctProductsClient
member.summary: Decorator that caches ItemNumber -> ReleasedDistinctProductCategory mappings to avoid repeated FSCM OData calls. Drop-in replacement for IFscmReleasedDistinctProductsClient.

member.summary: Executes extract work order guid set.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaLineFetcherWorkflow.GetWorkOrderProductPresenceAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes get work order product presence async.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaLineFetcherWorkflow.GetWorkOrderServicePresenceAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes get work order service presence async.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaLineFetcherWorkflow.EnrichWorkOrdersWithWorkTypeFieldsAsync(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Enrich work orders with Work Type + Well Age.
Previous behavior split the formatted lookup name using a configured separator. That approach was brittle and caused "Well Age" / "Work Type" mix-ups.
New behavior: - Read the work type lookup id from msdyn_workorder (_rpc_worktypelookup_value) - Fetch rpc_worktype rows for those ids - Use rpc_welltype -> "Work Type" and rpc_wellage -> "Well Age"

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaLineFetcher
member.summary: Thin facade delegating all IFsaLineFetcher behavior to . This preserves existing DI wiring and behavior while enforcing SRP at the class level.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmAccountingPeriodHttpClient
member.summary: Thin facade that preserves contract, delegating all logic to .

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmAccountingPeriodResolver
member.summary: Encapsulates FSCM accounting-period resolution logic (query building, parsing, caching, semantics). Extracted from FscmAccountingPeriodHttpClient to improve SRP. Behavior preserved.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmAuthHandler
member.summary: Adds FSCM AAD bearer token to outbound HTTP requests. Scope is resolved per-request from host using FscmOptions. Attach ONLY to HttpClients that call FSCM.

member.summary: Executes resolve scope.

member.summary: Executes fetch baseline async.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmBaselineFetcher.Sha256Hex(System.String)
member.summary: Executes sha 256 hex.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmBearerTokenProvider
member.summary: Cached AAD bearer token provider for FSCM (client credentials). Token cache is per-scope (per host), safe for multiple AOS instances. Register as singleton.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmBearerTokenProvider.GetAccessTokenAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes get access token async.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmCustomValidationClient
member.summary: Calls the FSCM custom validation endpoint. Response schema is customer-specific, so parsing is best-effort: - If HTTP 2xx and no recognizable failure array is found, validation is treated as successful. - If HTTP non-2xx, a FailFast or Retryable failure is returned depending on .

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmDocuAttachmentsHttpClient
member.summary: Thin client for FSCM OData custom entity RPCCustomDocuAttachments.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmGlobalAttributeMappingHttpClient
member.summary: FSCM OData client for AttributeTypeGlobalAttributes. Loads mapping (Name, FSA) into memory so AIS can map FS attributes to FSCM attribute names at runtime.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmInvoiceAttributesHttpClient
member.summary:
FSCM custom endpoints for invoice attributes: - Definitions ("attribute table") - Current values snapshot - Update values (InvoiceAttributes: [{AttributeName, AttributeValue}])
This client now acts as the orchestration layer only. Request construction, HTTP transport/audit logging, and response parsing are delegated to smaller collaborators to keep the client aligned with SRP/DIP.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalFetchHttpClient
member.summary: FSCM OData fetch client to retrieve journal lines by WorkOrder GUID. Maps multiple entity sets (Item/Expense/Hour) into a normalized FscmJournalLine DTO.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalFetchHttpClient.ResolveBaseUrlOrThrow
member.summary: Executes resolve base url or throw.

member.summary: Executes try get guid.

member.summary: Executes trim.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.ExpenseJournalFetchPolicy.Select
member.summary: $select list for ExpenseJournalLines. Avoid 'LineAmount' unless have confirmed it exists in FSCM metadata. Keep 'Amount' as optional extended amount when exposed.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.ExpenseJournalFetchPolicy.SelectFallback
member.summary: Since we are not requesting any known-problematic fields, fallback can be identical.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.ExpenseJournalFetchPolicy.GetUnitPrice(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Returns a unit price suitable for delta comparisons. Uses the same normalization approach as Item: if ProjectSalesPrice looks extended and Amount exists, normalize.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.FscmJournalFetchPolicyBase
member.summary: Base helpers for FSCM journal fetch policies.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.FscmJournalFetchPolicyBase.SelectFallback
member.summary: Optional fallback $select used when the primary Select fails due to missing fields in a given FSCM environment. Defaults to .

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.FscmJournalFetchPolicyResolver
member.summary: Resolves the configured for a given .

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.IFscmJournalFetchPolicy
member.summary: Journal-type specific FSCM OData metadata and mapping rules for journal history fetch. OCP: eliminates journal-type switches in .

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.IFscmJournalFetchPolicy.EntitySet
member.summary: FSCM OData entity set (e.g., JournalTrans).

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.IFscmJournalFetchPolicy.Select
member.summary: Comma-separated $select list.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.IFscmJournalFetchPolicy.GetQuantity(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Extracts the quantity/hours for this journal type. Must return a non-null value (0 if missing).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.IFscmJournalFetchPolicy.GetUnitPrice(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Extracts the unit price for this journal type (nullable).

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.ItemJournalFetchPolicy.Select
member.summary: $select list for ProjectItemJournalTrans. : 'LineAmount' is NOT available in environment (confirmed by OData error), so we only include 'Amount' as an optional extended amount if exposed by metadata.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.ItemJournalFetchPolicy.SelectFallback
member.summary: Since we are not requesting any known-problematic fields, fallback can be identical.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmJournalPolicies.ItemJournalFetchPolicy.GetUnitPrice(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Returns a unit price suitable for delta comparisons. In some FSCM environments, ProjectSalesPrice can be an extended amount (line total) rather than a unit price. If 'Amount' is available and indicates ProjectSalesPrice is extended, normalize: unit = Amount / Quantity. If 'Amount' is missing, return ProjectSalesPrice as-is (best-effort).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmLegalEntityIntegrationParametersHttpClient
member.summary: FSCM OData client for LegalEntityIntegrationParametersBaseIntParamTables. Used to resolve journal name identifiers for WO integration.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmProjectStatusHttpClient
member.summary: Thin client for FSCM custom project status update endpoint.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmProjectStatusHttpClient.UpdateAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.String,System.String,System.Guid,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Preferred overload: update project status for a specific WO + SubProjectId using the agreed payload contract.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmProjectStatusHttpClient.UpdateAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Legacy overload: preserved. Sends Company as empty string and SubProjectId as GUID string. maps textual newStatus to numeric Status when possible.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmProjectStatusHttpClient.UpdateAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Legacy overload: older callers used a textual status ("Posted", "Cancelled", ...). This adapter maps known values to numeric codes: - Posted => 5 - Cancel / Cancelled / Canceled => 6

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmReleasedDistinctProductsHttpClient
member.summary: FSCM OData client for CDSReleasedDistinctProducts used to derive ProjCategoryId/RPCProjCategoryId by ItemNumber.

member.summary: Provides fscm single work order http client behavior.

member.summary: Executes post async.

member.summary: Executes resolve base url.

member.summary: Executes build url.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmSingleWorkOrderHttpClient.Trim(System.String)
member.summary: Executes trim.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmSubProjectHttpClient
member.summary:
Calls the FSCM custom endpoint for SubProject creation. Sends payload using the required FSCM contract envelope: { "_request": { ... } }. Adds AAD bearer token using client-credentials.
Prod policy: - 401/403 => fail-fast - 429/5xx => transient => throw (durable retry) - other 4xx => non-transient => return error (do not throw) - 2xx with FSCM business Status=Error => return exact FSCM message

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FscmWorkOrderStatusUpdateHttpClient
member.summary: Calls the FSCM custom endpoint responsible for updating work-order posting status.

member.summary: Executes update async.

member.summary: Executes update async.

member.summary: Executes resolve base url.

member.summary: Executes build url.

member.summary: Factory used by typed to build a posting workflow using the provided typed instance.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.PostingHttpClientWorkflow
member.summary: Posting workflow coordinating preparation + posting outcome processing. Refactor goal: keep this class focused on orchestration (SRP) and rely on injected pipelines (OCP).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.PostingHttpClient
member.summary: Typed HttpClient facade for posting. Keeps DI surface small by delegating to a workflow built from .

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.PostingWorkflowFactory
member.summary: Builds a posting workflow with cohesive collaborators while keeping the typed HttpClient instance.

member.summary: Builds FSCM HTTP requests (posting + custom validation), keeping headers and content setup consistent.

member.summary: Executes a post and converts the HTTP response into , including running handlers.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.IWoJournalProjector
member.summary: Defines WO journal projection behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.ProjectionResult
member.summary: Carries projection result data.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.ProjectionResult.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Carries projection result data.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.WoJournalProjector
member.summary:
Projects a normalized WO payload down to a single journal type section (Item/Expense/Hour), pruning work orders where that section is missing or empty.
OCP: journal section key resolution is delegated to so adding a new journal type is additive (policy + DI), not a switch edit.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.WoJournalProjector.Project(System.String,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.JournalType)
member.summary: Executes project.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.WoJournalProjector.GetWoCountOrZero(System.String)
member.summary: Executes get wo count or zero.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.IWoPayloadNormalizer
member.summary: Normalizes incoming WO payload JSON to the canonical shape used by AIS: { "_request": { "WOList": [ ... ] } }.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.WoPayloadNormalizer
member.summary: Provides wo payload normalizer behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.WoPayloadNormalizer.NormalizeToWoListKey(System.String)
member.summary: Executes normalize to wo list key.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.IWoPayloadShapeGuard
member.summary: Validates the WO payload has the minimum required schema/envelope to proceed. This is a "hard fail" guard (schema issues are not line-filterable).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.IWoPostingPreparationPipeline
member.summary: Prepares a WO payload for posting a single journal type: normalize -> shape guard -> local validation+filter -> optional remote validation -> project section.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.IWoPostingPreparationPipeline.PrepareValidatedAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.JournalType,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Prepares an already-validated WO payload (skips local/remote validation) and projects it for a single journal type.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.PreparedWoPosting
member.summary: Prepared payload and metadata for posting.
Prepared payload and metadata for posting.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.PayloadPostingDateAdjuster
member.summary:
Applies the fiscal period rule: - RPCWorkingDate (Work/Ops date from FS) remains the original operations date. - TransactionDate is resolved by period status: OPEN => TransactionDate = RPCWorkingDate CLOSED/ON-HOLD => TransactionDate = StartDate of the NEXT OPEN period (based on ops date’s period)
Uses the AccountingPeriodSnapshot resolver (single source of truth).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.Posting.PostOutcomeProcessor
member.summary: Default . Owns posting execution (HTTP) and mapping into including handlers.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.DataverseSchema
member.summary: Provides dataverse schema behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.IFsaODataQueryBuilder
member.summary: Defines i fsa o data query builder behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.IODataPagedReader
member.summary: Defines io data paged reader behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.IFsaRowFlattener
member.summary: Defines i fsa row flattener behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.IWarehouseSiteEnricher
member.summary: Defines i warehouse site enricher behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.IVirtualLookupNameResolver
member.summary: Defines i virtual lookup name resolver behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaODataQueryBuilder.BuildOpenWorkOrdersRelative(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes build open work orders relative.

member.summary: Executes build work orders relative.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaODataQueryBuilder.BuildWorkOrderProductsRelative(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid},System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes build work order products relative.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaODataQueryBuilder.BuildWorkOrderServicesRelative(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid},System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes build work order services relative.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaODataQueryBuilder.BuildProductsRelative(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid},System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes build products relative.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaODataQueryBuilder.BuildWorkOrderProductPresenceRelative(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid})
member.summary: Executes build work order product presence relative.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaODataQueryBuilder.BuildWorkOrderServicePresenceRelative(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid})
member.summary: Executes build work order service presence relative.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaODataQueryBuilder.BuildWarehousesByIdsRelative(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid})
member.summary: Executes build warehouses by ids relative.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaODataQueryBuilder.BuildOperationalSitesByIdsRelative(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid})
member.summary: Executes build operational sites by ids relative.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaODataQueryBuilder.BuildVirtualLookupByIdsRelative(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid})
member.summary: Executes build virtual lookup by ids relative.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaODataQueryBuilder.BuildPresenceRelative(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid})
member.summary: Executes build presence relative.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaODataQueryBuilder.BuildOrGuidFilter(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Executes build or guid filter.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaRowFlattener
member.summary: Flattens common Dataverse expand shapes into top-level scalar fields expected by Core. This preserves the historic behavior that older FsaLineFetcher performed inline.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.FsaRowFlattener.FlattenWorkOrderCompanyFromExpand(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument)
member.summary: Flattens company info from the msdyn_serviceaccount expand into: - cdm_companycode (formatted value) - cdm_companyid (raw lookup guid string, if present)

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.VirtualLookupNameResolver.TryGetValueArray(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument,System.Text.Json.JsonElement@)
member.summary: Executes try get value array.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.WarehouseSiteEnricher.EnrichWopLinesFromWarehousesAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.Text.Json.JsonDocument,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes enrich wop lines from warehouses async.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.WarehouseSiteEnricher.WarehouseInfo
member.summary: Carries warehouse info data.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.WarehouseSiteEnricher.WarehouseInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Carries warehouse info data.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.WarehouseSiteEnricher.BuildWarehouseMap(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument)
member.summary: Executes build warehouse map.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.WarehouseSiteEnricher.BuildOperationalSiteMap(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument)
member.summary: Executes build operational site map.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.WarehouseSiteEnricher.TryGetValueArray(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument,System.Text.Json.JsonElement@)
member.summary: Executes try get value array.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Clients.WarehouseSiteEnricher.EnrichRows(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument,System.Func{System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}}})
member.summary: Executes enrich rows.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Utilities.FscmPostingResponseParser
member.summary: Parses the FSCM JournalAsync response into a -like shape. Extracted from PostingHttpClient to keep that class focused on HTTP orchestration (SRP) and to allow reuse in tests.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Utilities.FscmPostingResponseParser.TryGetBool(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Executes try get bool.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Utilities.FscmPostingResponseParser.TryGetString(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Executes try get string.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Utilities.FscmUrlBuilder
member.summary: Centralized FSCM URL construction and base-url resolution. Extracted to keep HTTP clients focused on orchestration (SRP) and make URL semantics reusable.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Utilities.FscmUrlBuilder.ResolveFscmBaseUrl(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmOptions,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Preferred: FscmOptions.FscmBaseUrl (single unified host). Fallback: legacy per-endpoint base URLs.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Utilities.FscmUrlBuilder.BuildUrl(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Executes build url.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Utils.JobRunDateResolver
member.summary: Centralized policy to resolve the "job run date" used for stamping and period comparisons. Updated: always uses UTC date (no config flags).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Logging.AppInsightsAisLogger
member.summary: AIS logger implementation that writes structured logs through ILogger. In Azure Functions, these logs flow to Application Insights when configured.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Logging.AppInsightsAisLogger.InfoAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes info async.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Logging.AppInsightsAisLogger.WarnAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes warn async.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Logging.AppInsightsAisLogger.ErrorAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Exception,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes error async.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Logging.LogScopeContext
member.summary: Normalized logging scope fields for all Functions/Activities/Clients. Keep it small and stable; add fields only when they are broadly useful.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Logging.LogScopes.BeginFunctionScope(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Logging.LogScopeContext)
member.summary: Preferred API: one context object.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Notifications.AcsEmailSender
member.summary: Azure Communication Services Email sender. This implementation is designed to be safe in production: - Honors CancellationToken - Validates recipients - Logs failures - Does NOT throw on send failure (so orchestration isn't failed by notification issues)

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Notifications.AcsEmailSender.SendAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes send async.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Notifications.InvalidPayloadEmailNotifier
member.summary: Logs AIS-side validation failures in structured form instead of sending emails. This is invoked BEFORE any posting attempt so that invalid records are never sent to FSCM.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Notifications.NoopEmailSender
member.summary: Placeholder email sender. Replace with Graph API, SendGrid, SMTP relay, Logic App, etc.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Notifications.NoopEmailSender.SendAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes send async.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.AcsEmailOptions
member.summary: Azure Communication Services Email configuration. Use Key Vault references for ConnectionString in Azure Function App settings.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.AcsEmailOptions.Enabled
member.summary: If false, email sending is disabled and NoopEmailSender should be used.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.AcsEmailOptions.ConnectionString
member.summary: ACS Email connection string (store in Key Vault; load via App Settings / KeyVault reference). Example setting name: "AcsEmail:ConnectionString"

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.AcsEmailOptions.FromAddress
member.summary: Sender email address. MUST be a verified sender/domain in ACS Email. Example: "no-reply@domain.com"

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.AcsEmailOptions.FromDisplayName
member.summary: Optional display name.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.AcsEmailOptions.WaitUntilCompleted
member.summary: If true, waits until ACS completes processing. If false, returns once accepted/started. Recommended: false for functions to reduce execution time.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmODataStagingOptions
member.summary:
Configuration for FSCM OData staging (Option B): - Header entity POST - Lines via /data/OData changeset
This is intentionally separated from existing posting options so existing deployments remain unchanged unless this feature is explicitly enabled.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmODataStagingOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Master feature toggle. Default false.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmODataStagingOptions.BaseUrl
member.summary: Base FSCM host URL, e.g. https://<env>.operations.dynamics.com If not provided, the system will fall back to Endpoints:FscmBaseUrl.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmODataStagingOptions.MaxConcurrentJournalsPerLegalEntity
member.summary: Maximum number of lines per OData changeset.
Maximum concurrent journal staging operations per legal entity (dataAreaId). This is an AIS-side throttle to reduce 429s.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmODataStagingOptions.VoucherPrefix
member.summary: Voucher prefix used when deterministic vouchers are required (Project item).

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmODataStagingOptions.HeaderIdempotencyPrefix
member.summary: Header idempotency key prefix stored in header Txt/Text/Description.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmOptions
member.summary: Unified options for FSCM side of AIS. Combines previously separate options: - FscmAuthOptions - EndpointsOptions (FSCM section) - FscmBaselineOptions - FscmAccountingPeriodOptions (nested as Periods)

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmOptions.DocuAttachmentsPath
member.summary: FSCM OData entity set for document attachment links (custom). Example: /data/RPCCustomDocuAttachments

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmOptions.JournalPostPath
member.summary: NEW posting endpoint (postJournal) that posts a list of created journals.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmOptions.InvoiceAttributeDefinitionsPath
member.summary: Custom endpoint to fetch invoice attribute definitions ("attribute table") for mapping generation.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmOptions.InvoiceAttributeValuesPath
member.summary: Custom endpoint to fetch current invoice attribute values for a subproject.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmOptions.JournalHistoryOrFilterChunkSize
member.summary:
Maximum number of WorkOrder GUIDs to include in a single OData $filter OR expression when fetching journal history (Item/Expense/Hour) from FSCM.
This guards against URL-length limits and server-side query parsing constraints. Default aligns with the FSA chunk default (25), but is independently configurable.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmOptions.ResolveBaseUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Executes resolve base url.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmOptions.DefaultScope
member.summary: Optional default scope, e.g. https://{host}/.default. If empty, handler derives scope from request host: https://{requestHost}/.default

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmOptions.ScopesByHost
member.summary: Optional per-host overrides. Key must be host only (no scheme).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmAccountingPeriodOptions
member.summary:
Config for FSCM accounting period resolution used by delta/reversal logic.
This is intentionally configurable because FO entity set + field names can vary.
Semantics intentionally mirror the legacy Dataverse plugin (JobLineEdgeCaseHandler): - If no period is found for a date => treat as OPEN - If no ledger status row is found for a period/ledger => treat as OPEN - A period is considered OPEN only if PeriodStatus matches OpenPeriodStatusValue(s).

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmAccountingPeriodOptions.EnableAccountingPeriodChecks
member.summary:
Feature toggle for accounting period logic.
When true (default), AIS will classify FSCM journal history into CLOSED vs OPEN periods and apply the configured closed reversal strategy.
When false, AIS will NOT call FSCM period APIs for classification; all history is treated as OPEN and ALL reversal/positive delta lines will use the job run date as TransactionDate.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmAccountingPeriodOptions.UseLocalTimeZoneForTransactionDate
member.summary: If true, AIS derives the job run date (TransactionDate) using instead of UTC. Only the DATE component is used in payloads.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmAccountingPeriodOptions.LocalTimeZoneId
member.summary: IANA time zone id used when is true. Example: "Asia/Kolkata".

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmReleasedDistinctProductsCacheOptions
member.summary: Cache policy for FSCM CDSReleasedDistinctProducts (ItemNumber -> CategoryId mapping). This cache is intended to dramatically reduce repeated OData calls across runs on the same warm host.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmReleasedDistinctProductsCacheOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Enables caching decorator.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmReleasedDistinctProductsCacheOptions.Ttl
member.summary: TTL for positive (found) entries. Default 24 hours.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmReleasedDistinctProductsCacheOptions.NegativeTtl
member.summary: TTL for negative (not found) entries. Default 60 minutes. Prevents repeated calls for ItemNumbers that FSCM does not return.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FscmReleasedDistinctProductsCacheOptions.MaxItemCountPerCall
member.summary: Upper bound on the number of ItemNumbers accepted per call. Helps prevent accidental huge allocations. Default 200k.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FsOptions
member.summary: Unified options for Field Service / Dataverse side of AIS. Combines previously separate options: - FsaIngestionOptions (Core) for ingestion/paging/filter - DataverseAuthOptions for AAD client credentials - EndpointsOptions (FSA section) for durable polling + function key

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FsOptions.DataverseApiBaseUrl
member.summary: Dataverse Web API base URL, e.g. https://{org}.crm.dynamics.com/api/data/v9.2

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FsOptions.WorkOrderFilter
member.summary: OData filter for open work orders.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FsOptions.ApplyFscmDeltaBeforePosting
member.summary: Prefer delta payload build before posting (default false).

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FsOptions.PreferMaxPageSize
member.summary: Dataverse server-side max page size hint via Prefer header: odata.maxpagesize={n}. If not configured, defaults to 5000.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FsOptions.OrFilterChunkSize
member.summary: OR-filter batching chunk size for Dataverse queries that aggregate by Work Order IDs. If not configured, defaults to 25.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FsOptions.RequireSubProjectForProcessing
member.summary: If true, AIS will only process work orders that have a sub-project lookup present. If false (default), behavior is unchanged.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FsOptions.DisableVirtualLookupResolution
member.summary: If true, virtual lookup name resolution will be skipped (no extra Dataverse calls). If false (default), behavior is unchanged.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.FsOptions.SyncInternalDocumentsToFscm
member.summary: If true, internal attachments are also synced to FSCM in addition to external attachments. If false (default), only external attachments are synced.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.NotificationOptions
member.summary: Provides notification options behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.NotificationOptions.GetRecipients
member.summary: Executes get recipients.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.NotificationOptions.GetInvalidPayloadRecipients
member.summary: Executes get invalid payload recipients.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.WarmupOptions
member.summary: Lightweight warm-up endpoint configuration. This is intentionally "read-only" and "small payload" to prime auth/TLS/DNS/HttpClient pipelines without performing expensive paging scans.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.WarmupOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Feature flag. When false, the warm-up endpoint returns 404.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.WarmupOptions.MaxMinutes
member.summary: Hard safety clamp to prevent long-running warm-up calls.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.WarmupOptions.DefaultMinutes
member.summary: Default minutes if request omits it.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.WarmupOptions.DefaultMaxConcurrency
member.summary: Default overall max concurrency if request omits it.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Options.WarmupOptions.DefaultDelayMs
member.summary: Default delay between loops (milliseconds) if request omits it.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.HttpPolicies
member.summary: Centralized HTTP resilience policy builder. Applies timeout + retry with exponential backoff.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.HttpResilienceOptions
member.summary: Enterprise-grade (but dependency-free) HTTP resilience options. This is intentionally simple and deterministic to avoid changing behavior unexpectedly.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.HttpResilienceOptions.MaxAttempts
member.summary: Maximum number of attempts for a single request (initial try + retries).

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.HttpResilienceOptions.BaseDelay
member.summary: Base delay for exponential backoff.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.HttpResilienceOptions.MaxDelay
member.summary: Maximum delay cap for backoff.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.HttpResilienceOptions.CircuitBreakerFailureThreshold
member.summary: Maximum consecutive failures before opening the circuit.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.HttpResilienceOptions.CircuitBreakerOpenDuration
member.summary: How long the circuit remains open before allowing a trial request.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.HttpResilienceOptions.UseJitter
member.summary: Whether to apply a small random jitter to delays.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.HttpResilienceOptions.NoRetryOperations
member.summary:
Operation names that must NOT be retried because the underlying request is non-idempotent.
Example: FSCM journal create/post. Retrying these can produce duplicate journals if the first attempt actually succeeded server-side but the client timed out or the response was lost.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.IHttpFailureClassifier
member.summary: Determines whether an HTTP outcome is retryable. Keep the logic centralized to avoid divergent retry behavior across clients.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.DefaultHttpFailureClassifier
member.summary: Default FSCM-friendly classifier: - Retry 408, 429, and 5xx - Do not retry most 4xx (other than 408/429) - Retry on transient transport exceptions.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Resilience.ResilientHttpExecutor
member.summary: Dependency-free resilience executor (retry + basic circuit breaker).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Telemetry
member.summary: Provides telemetry behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Telemetry.LogJson(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes log json.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Infrastructure.Telemetry.Sha256Hex(System.String)
member.summary: Executes sha 256 hex.
